brief_justification: Correct answer (C) with valid reasoning; goes one level beyond surface by constructing a timeline table and identifying the unaccounted epoch; minimal self-monitoring beyond mentioning an 'injection' technique; basic verification by confirming each other option conflicts with a witnessed location; presents answer confidently without noting assumptions; briefly addresses why alternatives fail ('every option except C maps to a confirmed window'); full derivation trail with timeline table showing all constraints and the elimination logic
